요한계시록 22:1.content: He showed me a river of water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding out of the throne of God and of the Lamb,

요한계시록 22:2.content: in the middle of its street. On this side of the river and on that was the tree of life, bearing twelve kinds of fruits, yielding its fruit every month. The leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.

요한계시록 22:3.content: There will be no curse any more. The throne of God and of the Lamb will be in it, and his servants will serve him.

요한계시록 22:4.content: They will see his face, and his name will be on their foreheads.

요한계시록 22:5.content: There will be no night, and they need no lamp light or sun light; for the Lord God will illuminate them. They will reign forever and ever.

요한계시록 22:6.content: He said to me, “These words are faithful and true. The Lord God of the spirits of the prophets sent his angel to show to his bondservants the things which must happen soon.”

요한계시록 22:7.content: “Behold, I come quickly. Blessed is he who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book.”

요한계시록 22:8.content: Now I, John, am the one who heard and saw these things. When I heard and saw, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel who had shown me these things.

요한계시록 22:9.content: He said to me, “See you don’t do it! I am a fellow bondservant with you and with your brothers, the prophets, and with those who keep the words of this book. Worship God.”

요한계시록 22:10.content: He said to me, “Don’t seal up the words of the prophecy of this book, for the time is at hand.

요한계시록 22:11.content: He who acts unjustly, let him act unjustly still. He who is filthy, let him be filthy still. He who is righteous, let him do righteousness still. He who is holy, let him be holy still.”

요한계시록 22:12.content: “Behold, I come quickly. My reward is with me, to repay to each man according to his work.

요한계시록 22:13.content: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.

요한계시록 22:14.content: Blessed are those who do his commandments, that they may have the right to the tree of life, and may enter in by the gates into the city.

요한계시록 22:15.content: Outside are the dogs, the sorcerers, the sexually immoral, the murderers, the idolaters, and everyone who loves and practices falsehood.

요한계시록 22:16.content: I, Jesus, have sent my angel to testify these things to you for the assemblies. I am the root and the offspring of David, the Bright and Morning Star.”

요한계시록 22:17.content: The Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” He who hears, let him say, “Come!” He who is thirsty, let him come. He who desires, let him take the water of life freely.

요한계시록 22:18.content: I testify to everyone who hears the words of the prophecy of this book, if anyone adds to them, may God add to him the plagues which are written in this book.

요한계시록 22:19.content: If anyone takes away from the words of the book of this prophecy, may God take away his part from the tree of life, and out of the holy city, which are written in this book.

요한계시록 22:20.content: He who testifies these things says, “Yes, I come quickly.” Amen! Yes, come, Lord Jesus.

요한계시록 22:21.content: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with all the saints. Amen.
